name: frontend-suite
description: Meta-bundle: the frontend category in one install — UI/UX stacks, React, React Native, Vue 3, JavaScript, TypeScript, Vite, Inertia, Livewire, the generalist web worker, real-component visual decisions (design-preview), greenfield shadcn staging (shadcn-studio), and accessibility auditing. Uninstall cleanly with /frontend-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
